ticket.subject: PluginHive Shopify Ship, Rate and Track for FedEx App On-boarding call for store smartbot-hobot.myshopify.com
ticket.raw_subject: PluginHive Shopify Ship, Rate and Track for FedEx App On-boarding call for store smartbot-hobot.myshopify.com
ticket.description:
Hello José,

Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **PH Ship Rate & Track for FedEx by PluginHive** on **smartbot-hobot.myshopify.com**

Our customer on-boarding team will contact you soon. This call is intended to help you complete the shipping configuration on your store. Please confirm if the below mentioned contact details are correct. If not, kindly provide an alternative contact details to get in touch with you.

Contact Number: | Email Address: info@smarttek.es

You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

Thanks and Regards,
Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello José,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I am Touseef from the PH Ship, Rate and Track for FedEx app. Thank you for installing the app.

I tried reaching you on +34634445569 but was not able to connect.

Also, I observed that you have not added your FedEx Account with the app yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulties.

We can also provide a free Onboarding for the app over a Zoom call to help you with the app setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
Alternately, please **CLICK HERE** to schedule a call as per your availability.

Hope to hear from you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello José,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
I am Touseef from the PH Ship, Rate and Track for FedEx app. Thank you for installing the app.
 
I tried reaching you on +34634445569 but was not able to connect.
 
Also, I observed that you have not added your FedEx Account with the app yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulties.
 
We can also provide a free Onboarding for the app over a Zoom call to help you with the app setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
Alternately, please CLICK HERE to schedule a call as per your availability.
 
Hope to hear from you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
**KEEP this ticket OPEN and share it with the L3 team: SAME Has to be implemented in all apps FedEx App, MCSL, WSS , Shipment tracking and Australia post app **
We have modified the Zendesk process to send this email. As you can see, the initial email is generated from José and it appears as if he is sending the email to himself. Most likely, this will land in SPAM.
There is no personalization in the current approach. I would prefer that a Customer Success Manager or Product Owner sends this email, with the reply-to set as support@pluginhive.com or support@pluginhive.zendesk.com.
Please make the email as personal as possible and use the actual store domain instead of the myshopify domain where applicable.
**Important:** We do not want these installation/uninstallation emails to be created as Zendesk tickets. They should only be created in Zendesk when the customer replies. These automated emails are creating noise, and the support team is unable to effectively prioritize and respond to real customer queries.

* * *
**Subject:** Start Printing FedEx Labels & Show Rates on smartbot-hobot.com Today
Hello José,
Greetings from PluginHive!
Thank you for installing the Shopify FedEx Shipping app on smartbot-hobot.myshopify.com.
Connect your FedEx account to start printing FedEx labels and showing live FedEx rates at checkout today.
We also offer a free 30-minute onboarding Zoom call to help you complete the setup quickly.
Please let us know your availability, or schedule a call here.
You can also refer to our setup documentation here.
Thanks and Regards,
Keerthi
Customer Success Manager
Team PluginHive
